pending.body: src/contexts/workflow_composition/engine.rs:5652-5669, 6172-6178, 6252-6301, and 6408-6440 recover a terminal iterative result from only the `*.parsed.json` sidecar and then fabricate `RecordProducer` from the current `resolved_target`. If the implementer backend/model drifts before `resume` (the new preflight-skip path explicitly allows that), or if the adapter reported a different actual model on the original invocation, the persisted `plan_and_implement` payload/artifact will be attributed to a backend/model that never actually ran. Persist the original producer metadata alongside the sidecar and restore it during recovery instead of synthesizing it from the current target.

src/contexts/workflow_composition/engine.rs:6484-6556 falls back to a raw filesystem hash outside git, but that path excludes only `.git` and `.ralph-burning`. Unlike the git-specific path in src/contexts/workflow_composition/engine.rs:6687-6707, it does not ignore `target/`, `target-final`, or `result*`, so any build/test side effects in a non-git workspace will keep `diff_changed=true` and prevent the loop from ever reaching the intended "stable" stop condition. Apply the same build-artifact exclusions to the filesystem fallback hash.

status_summary: running: final review restart round 11 -> Plan and Implement
